detail.description: Starling Marte singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Heliot Ramos.
Starling Marte singles on a ground ball to center fielder Derek Hill. Bobby Witt Jr. scores. Nick Loftin to 2nd.
Starling Marte singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Edmundo Sosa. Nick Loftin scores. Starling Marte to 2nd.
Starling Marte singles on a line drive to center fielder Justin Crawford.
Starling Marte singles on a soft ground ball to first baseman Jonathan Aranda.
Starling Marte singles on a ground ball to right fielder Nelson Velázquez.
Starling Marte singles on a line drive to left fielder Nelson Velázquez.
Starling Marte doubles (4) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jordan Walker. Bobby Witt Jr. scores.
Starling Marte singles on a ground ball to right fielder Brandon Nimmo. Vinnie Pasquantino to 2nd.
Starling Marte singles on a pop up to right fielder Wilyer Abreu, deflected by first baseman Willson Contreras.
Starling Marte singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Lane Thomas to 2nd.
Starling Marte singles on a line drive to right fielder David Fry. Salvador Perez to 3rd.
Starling Marte doubles (3) on a ground ball to left fielder Josh Lowe.
Starling Marte singles on a line drive to right fielder Jo Adell.
Starling Marte singles on a ground ball to left fielder Brandon Lockridge.

Starling Marte singles on a ground ball to right fielder Colby Thomas. Salvador Perez to 2nd.

Starling Marte singles on a ground ball to shortstop CJ Abrams, deflected by pitcher Andrew Alvarez.

Starling Marte doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Steven Kwan. Lane Thomas scores. Fielding error by center fielder Steven Kwan.
